title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at AirAsia India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at AirAsia India
jsonLd.description:
AirAsia India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Madurai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About AirAsia India:
AirAsia India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AirAsia India!
